message:
feat: compaction turns flow through transcript via OnCompactionTurn callback

Layer 3 (checkpoint) and Layer 4 (summarizeWithLLM) now produce
TurnCheckpoint and TurnSummary turns instead of TurnUserInput.
OnCompactionTurn callback on ContextManager lets the session record
these compaction events in the transcript. Backward compatibility
preserved for old TurnUserInput checkpoints via text-prefix matching.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
